name: higgsfield
description: Image and video generation, Soul Character training, and branded Marketing Studio via Higgsfield AI.

interface.shortDescription: Train Soul Characters and generate powerful AI visuals
interface.longDescription: Higgsfield AI Skills turn Codex into a creative production agent. Train reusable Soul Characters from real photos, generate high-quality images and videos across Higgsfield models, create polished product photoshoots, build marketplace-ready product cards, and produce branded ad assets through Marketing Studio. The plugin uses the Higgsfield CLI for authenticated workflows and returns ready-to-use result URLs.
defaultPrompt: Train a Soul Character from these photos
Generate a cinematic product image with Higgsfield
Create marketplace-ready product cards for this item
